en.title: Evaporative Coolers vs Portable AC: Dry-Climate Value, Humidity Limits, and Five Models
en.description: Five evaporative coolers ranked by CFM, water use, pad TCO, and noise — plus when swamp coolers beat portable AC and when humidity makes them a miss.
